query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "measuring epistemic resilience of llms under misleading medical contex" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by measuring the same core mechanism—LLM robustness and accuracy degradation under misleading or injected medical/biomedical context—which is the direct operationalization of "epistemic resilience" in the user's question. It also fits criterion (b) by providing empirical data on the dependent variable (resilience/accuracy) within the specific domain (biomedical question answering) the user is investigating.
